title: Praetor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses}}
[[File:JKA_saber5.png|thumb|250px|The Praetor hilt.]]
'''Praetor''' was a basic [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Lightsaber hilt/Legends|hilt]] used in the [[New Jedi Order]] by [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]. This type of hilt was quite common at the start of the New Jedi Order.<ref name="JKA">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref> This type of hilt was longer than most single-bladed designs, and followed a simple design.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''
